main.description: The canonical self-published profile for an AT Protocol account host or host operator. This record describes the public host brand; individual PDS hostnames, endpoints, signup posture, and account-control capabilities belong in account.atmosphere.host.service records.

name.description: The display name of the host or host operator.

description.description: A short public description of who this host is for.

operatorType.description: Self-declared broad operator type. Other string values may be valid.

links.description: Relevant public destinations for the host. The first homepage or signup link should be treated as the primary destination.

images.description: Visual assets for host cards and rich host pages, such as avatars, logos, banners, hero images, and social cards.

contact.description: Optional public support or operator contact metadata.

serviceRefs.description: Optional references to account.atmosphere.host.service records controlled by this operator account. AppViews should also index service records directly by author DID.

tags.description: Open discovery tags for filtering and search, preferably lowercase. Do not use tags for signup status, capabilities, or verification state.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this profile was last updated.
